name: Chat Thread
description: Full message thread container with scrollable messages, typing indicator, pagination, and auto-scroll behavior.

standard.description: Standard chat thread with messages and anchored input

branched.description: Thread with branch indicator for conversation forks

slots.branch-indicator: Visual marker showing conversation branch point

slots.messages: Scrollable message list with ChatMessage components

visual_brief: Vertically scrolling message thread with alternating alignment for user and AI messages. User bubbles align right with accent background; AI responses align left with surface background and wider max-width. A pulsing dot-trio typing indicator appears at the bottom when the AI is generating. A floating scroll-to-bottom FAB fades in when the user scrolls up past a threshold.

layout_hints.scroll_ownership: The message list is the primary scrollable region and should not fight with outer page wrappers for scroll ownership.
layout_hints.bubble_measure: Message bubbles should keep a readable max-width rather than stretching to the container edge, especially for long AI responses.
layout_hints.typing_state: Typing indicators and load-more controls should feel like part of the thread rhythm instead of detached widgets.

responsive.mobile: Messages span full width with minimal horizontal padding (12px). Avatars shrink to 28px or hide entirely. Typing indicator anchors to bottom of viewport. Scroll-to-bottom FAB shifts to bottom-right corner with 16px inset. Load-more button becomes a pull-to-refresh gesture at the top.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with comfortable padding. Avatars visible at 36px. Message bubbles max-width at 75% of container. Typing indicator and scroll-to-bottom FAB remain in default positions.
responsive.desktop: Message bubbles cap at 640px max-width for readability. Full avatars at 40px with timestamp on hover. Branch indicators show as a vertical sidebar gutter. Keyboard shortcuts enabled for navigation between messages.

motion.message-entrance: New messages slide in from the bottom with a 200ms ease-out and 50ms stagger between sequential messages. AI messages additionally fade from 0 to 1 opacity.
motion.typing-indicator: Three dots animate in a 1.2s infinite loop — each dot scales from 0.4 to 1.0 with 150ms offset per dot, creating a wave pulse effect.
motion.scroll-to-bottom: FAB fades in (opacity 0 to 1, 150ms) and translates up 8px when scroll position exceeds one viewport height from bottom. Reverse on dismiss.
motion.auto-scroll: When a new message arrives and the user is within 100px of the bottom, smooth-scroll to the new message over 300ms ease-in-out.

keyboard: Tab moves between message actions and the composer in reading order.
Keyboard users should be able to reach the scroll-to-bottom control when it appears.
announcements: New assistant and user messages should be announced appropriately without rereading the entire thread.
Typing indicator state changes should be announced sparingly.
accessibility.focus_management: Do not steal focus when new messages arrive. Preserve the reader's current position unless they explicitly choose to jump to the latest message.
